arts.ttl: 'Nothing to do with Celtic...' Brendan Rodgers drops Kieran Tierney and Arsenal claim
arts.sum: It has been well-documented that Tierney will return to Celtic in the summer, several years after he left his boyhood club and joined Arsenal in 2019. Arsenal defender Kieran Tierney was a big talking point for Celtic during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Is there a Celtic vs Dundee live stream? TV channel, PPV, ref, VAR and team news for Parkhead clash
arts.sum: The Hoops can restore their 13-point lead over Rangers with a midweek victory against the Dees

arts.ttl: Jeffrey Schlupp pictured checking in at Celtic as only deadline day addition prepares for Brendan Rodgers reunion
arts.sum: The versatile Dutchman worked with Rodgers at Leicester and has touched down at Glasgow Airport from London

arts.ttl: Sky reporter explains why Kasper Schmeichel was absent from Celtic training ahead of Dundee match
arts.sum: However, Duncan did add that he will ask Rodgers ‘if there is anything worth noting’ regarding Schmeichel not training because Celtic can’t afford to be without him ahead of that huge Bayern game. But the Sky reporter noted that Kasper Schmeichel was absent from training and how the 38-year-old has previously been allowed ‘extra rest’, so it could be a reason for his absence, as he told Sky Sports News (04/02/25 at 3:40 pm).

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou gets his wish at Tottenham, as Celtic let Brendan Rodgers down
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers let down by Celtic in the January transfer market Whilst Celtic fans and Rodgers express their frustration at the transfer market, Postecoglou got his wish at Tottenham, despite negative clouds over the London club.

arts.ttl: Lyall Cameron told brutal Rangers reality amid Dundee training absence as forgotten £1.5m transfer option remains
arts.sum: The midfielder will make his move to Ibrox in the summer after penning a pre-contract agreement with the Glasgow giants

arts.ttl: McGregor's 'dream come true' of reaching 500 Celtic games
arts.sum: Callum McGregor has gone from Celtic ball boy to captain in a career that has earned him 23 major honours, so far.

arts.ttl: I am striker that was so close to Celtic transfer on deadline day but my move collapsed for one key reason
arts.sum: It was a similar case for the Hoops in this winter window as they failed to replace Kyogo Furuhashi

arts.ttl: Panicked Celtic diehards fear Brendan Rodgers may walk as Hotline clamps board for setting their own money trap
arts.sum: Michael Gannon takes your calls the morning after the window slammed shut and Hoops fans were far from happy

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Dundee referee & VAR officials confirmed
arts.sum: Celtic vs Dundee referee & VAR officials confirmed
